# Operational Readiness Checklist: User Authentication

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for local setup, database migration, seed data, environment configuration, and operational validation of authentication.
**Created**: 2026-06-17
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are database setup requirements complete for schema generation, migration application, and seed execution order? [Completeness, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK002 Are prerequisites defined for the previous organization and subscription-plan migrations before auth seed data can be created? [Dependency, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements explicit that authentication tables are persisted as mapped database names such as `users`, not necessarily Prisma model names such as `User`? [Clarity, Data Model §User]
- [ ] CHK004 Are seed-data requirements complete for all three user types, including email, password, expected role scope, and expected landing area? [Completeness, Spec §FR-028, Data Model §User, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements documented for how tenant-scoped seed users select or create an organization when no active organization exists? [Completeness, Data Model §User]
- [ ] CHK006 Are command ownership requirements complete enough to distinguish root workspace commands from package-local Prisma commands? [Gap, Quickstart §Setup]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK007 Is the required command syntax for seed execution unambiguous for pnpm workspace filtering and direct Prisma binary execution? [Clarity, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK008 Are environment variable requirements clear for API JWT secrets, token lifetimes, web IronSession password, cookie name, and API base URL? [Clarity, Plan §Technical Context, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK009 Are minimum secret length requirements documented clearly enough for local `.env` and `.env.local` setup? [Gap, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK010 Is the intended difference between `pnpm prisma:generate`, `pnpm prisma:migrate`, and `pnpm prisma:seed` described with enough precision to avoid running only generation when database tables are required? [Clarity, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK011 Are the expected names and purposes of created auth persistence resources clearly specified for users, sessions, refresh tokens, and audit events? [Clarity, Spec §FR-024, Data Model §UserSession, Data Model §RefreshToken, Data Model §AuthenticationAuditEvent]
- [ ] CHK012 Are local target URLs and package dev-server responsibilities defined clearly enough for web-to-API auth validation? [Clarity, Quickstart §Run Locally]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK013 Are persistence requirements consistent between the spec entities, Prisma-oriented plan, data model names, and quickstart setup flow? [Consistency, Spec §Key Entities, Plan §Storage, Data Model §User, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK014 Are seed user credentials consistent across the spec, data model, quickstart, and task list? [Consistency, Spec §FR-028, Data Model §User, Quickstart §Setup, Tasks §T032]
- [ ] CHK015 Are organization-scope requirements consistent between seeded `ORGANIZATION` and `STANDARD` users and tenant-isolation principles? [Consistency, Constitution §III, Spec §FR-022, Data Model §User]
- [ ] CHK016 Are browser-session requirements consistent between IronSession configuration, quickstart validation, and the rule that tokens must not be exposed to client-side scripts? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-025, Quickstart §Web Validation Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK017 Are root quality-gate commands consistent with package-level commands and the monorepo workflow described by the constitution? [Consistency, Constitution §Development Workflow and Quality Gates, Quickstart §Automated Gates]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK018 Can successful local setup be objectively measured from the requirements without relying on unstated database inspection steps? [Measurability, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK019 Are expected outcomes for seed execution measurable beyond command success, including the required accounts and tenant scope? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §FR-028, Quickstart §Setup]
- [ ] CHK020 Are manual API contract checks defined with enough expected response details to validate login, current session, refresh, and logout without exposing secrets in documentation? [Measurability, Quickstart §API Contract Checks]
- [ ] CHK021 Are validation outcomes for sandbox or restricted local environments documented clearly enough to distinguish environment limitations from feature failures? [Gap, Quickstart §Implementation Validation Results]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK022 Are requirements defined for a fresh database where prior migrations have not been applied yet? [Coverage, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK023 Are requirements defined for an existing database where the demo organization or starter subscription plan already exists? [Coverage, Data Model §User]
- [ ] CHK024 Are requirements defined for re-running seed data idempotently without duplicating users or corrupting their scope? [Coverage, Spec §FR-028]
- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements defined for local setup failure modes such as missing database, missing JWT secrets, short IronSession password, or unavailable API base URL? [Coverage, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK026 Are recovery requirements documented for when migration succeeds but seed execution fails afterward? [Recovery Flow, Gap]
- [ ] CHK027 Are requirements clear about how to proceed when local HTTP smoke checks are blocked by the execution environment? [Recovery Flow, Quickstart §Implementation Validation Results]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK028 Are assumptions about PostgreSQL availability and `.env` placement documented with enough detail for both API and web packages? [Assumption, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK029 Are dependency requirements for Prisma Client generation and migration application traceable to the persistence changes in the data model? [Dependency, Plan §Testing, Data Model §User]
- [ ] CHK030 Are setup requirements clear that public cadastro remains out of scope and seed/admin provisioning is the source of initial users? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Tasks §Notes]
- [ ] CHK031 Are operational requirements clear about future Prisma deprecation warnings versus blocking setup failures? [Gap, Quickstart §Setup]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK032 Is there any ambiguity between "table of users" in product language and mapped table/model naming in Prisma and PostgreSQL? [Ambiguity, Data Model §User]
- [ ] CHK033 Is there any conflict between local default secrets for developer convenience and production secret requirements? [Conflict, Quickstart §Prerequisites]
- [ ] CHK034 Are rollback expectations for auth migrations intentionally deferred or missing from the requirements? [Gap, Plan §Testing]
- [ ] CHK035 Are requirement IDs, task IDs, and quickstart sections traceable enough for reviewers to map setup failures back to a specific requirement or assumption? [Traceability, Spec §FR-024, Spec §FR-028, Tasks §T009-T012, Quickstart §Setup]
